_note: Post-import pipeline regression expectations for the Lloyds Statement_2026_lloyds.pdf fixture. The summary, categorisation and risk LOGIC lives in Base44, NOT in this parser repo. This file and its test lock the PARSER OUTPUT the pipeline consumes, so a future parser change cannot regress and feed the pipeline bad inputs (the Phase 2 bug: total_income = 0, total_spending = 99.40, a false Negative Net Cashflow flag).

risk_expectations.negative_net_cashflow: must NOT be raised — net_movement is positive (+99.40)
risk_expectations.review_concentration: may be raised by Base44 if many AI categories stay review_required
